task_completion.description: Open the Apache configuration file for the target domain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., nano, vim, gedit) is open showing the file '/etc/apache2/sites-available/acmecorp.test.conf'.

task_completion.description: Add the Apache Alias directive mapping the URL path to the filesystem path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration file contains a line similar to 'Alias /marketing /var/acme_marketing'.

task_completion.description: Grant Apache access to the new filesystem directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration file contains a '<Directory "/var/acme_marketing">' block with 'Require all granted' (or equivalent access permissions) to prevent a 403 Forbidden error.

task_completion.description: Apply the configuration changes by reloading or restarting Apache.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window shows a successful execution of a command like 'sudo systemctl reload apache2' or 'sudo systemctl restart apache2'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the file loads successfully in a web browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser (or a command-line HTTP client like curl) is open, navigating to 'http://acmecorp.test/marketing/press_kit_v1.txt', and displaying the text 'AcmeCorp Official Press Kit - Q3 2024'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used an Alias and not a Redirect.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Apache configuration file must use the 'Alias' directive, and must NOT contain 'Redirect /marketing' or 'RedirectMatch'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent configured Apache rather than just creating a filesystem symlink.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should edit the Apache .conf file. There should be no terminal commands creating a symbolic link (e.g., 'ln -s /var/acme_marketing /var/www/html/marketing').

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually loaded the file via the web server.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final verification must show the content being served over HTTP (e.g., in a browser address bar or via a curl command to the http:// URL), not just using 'cat' on the local filesystem.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Apache configuration file is located at '/etc/apache2/sites-available/acmecorp.test.conf'. The correct configuration requires mapping the URL path '/marketing' to the filesystem path '/var/acme_marketing'. The test file is accessible at 'http://acmecorp.test/marketing/press_kit_v1.txt' and its expected content contains 'AcmeCorp Official Press Kit - Q3 2024'.
